calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ADAP.TV, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. ADAP is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant VIROOL, INC. in the amount of $609,686.22 plus costs per the memorandum of costs procedure and any attorney's fees awarded by way of a post-judgment motion. No opposition filed.

ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED after hearing.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

Off Calendar Dec-07-2017 Continued To Feb-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

No appearances.

PLAINTIFF ADAP.TV, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Continued to February 1, 2018 at 9:30 AM in Department 302/Law and Motion per the stipulation and order filed November 30, 2017.

Notice Of Motion And Moion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dhaivat H. Shah, Esq. of Grellas Shah LLP, Tel. 408.255.6315, for defendant, and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. GRELLAS SHAH LLP'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for defendant VIROOL, INC. is GRANTED. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED.
